description:
From a paralyzed lamb on their journey to recovery to a rescued raccoon pup and kitten becoming best friends, these pets and their stories are here to lift heavy hearts and remind people that the internet wasn't invented to cause so much frustration, because it was invented for adorable kittens! #Cat #Dog #Kitten #Cute #Heartwarming #Pets

We're the happy place for animal lovers!  You’ll always find real pets, real joy and real moments that remind you why animals make life better, here at The Pe

title: Watch This If You Need Some Peace | 20 Minutes of Adorable and Heartwarming Pet Videos
